BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: FUTURE BUSINESS LEADERS OF AMERICA

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: INSPIRES AND PREPARES STUDENTS TO BECOME COMMUNITY-MINDED BUSINESS LEADERS IN A GLOBAL SOCIETY THROUGH RELEVANT CAREER PREPARATION AND LEADERSHIP EXPERIENCES.
IRS990.MissionDesc: OUR MISSION IS TO INSPIRE AND PREPARE STUDENTS TO BECOME COMMUNITY-MINDED LEADERS IN A GLOBAL SOCIETY THROUGH RELEVANT CAREER PREPARATION AND LEADERSHIP EXPERIENCES.
IRS990.Desc: A PROGRAM DESIGNED TO EDUCATE THE YOUTH OF AMERICA TO UNDERSTAND THE BUSINESS PHILOSOPHY OF OUR ECONOMY FOR FUTURE PARTICIPATION IN SERVICING ITS NEEDS AND TO FURTHER THE DEVELOPMENT OF INDIVIDUAL LEADERSHIP QUALITIES.

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: MARY AIT

Form990PartVIISectionAGrp.TitleTxt: ADVISER TO THE STATE OFFICERS - KENTUCKY CHAPTER

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: TRI LEADERSHIP RESOURCES LLC

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE A, PART III, LINE 12, EXPLANATION OF OTHER INCOME:

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE CHAPTERS MAKE AWARDS AND SCHOLARSHIPS DIRECTLY TO STUDENTS IN THE UNITED STATES.

THE FOLLOWING SUBORDINATES ISSUED 1099 FORMS FOR THE 2019 CALENDAR YEAR: ARIZONA, ARKANSAS, FLORIDA, ILLINOIS, INDIANA, IOWA, KENTUCKY, LOUISIANA, MISSOURI, NEBRASKA, NEVADA, NEW HAMPSHIRE, NEW YORK, NORTH CAROLINA, OREGON, PENNSYLVANIA, SOUTH CAROLINA, TEXAS, UTAH, WASHINGTON, WYOMING.
THE FOLLOWING SUBORDINATES HAD PAID EMPLOYEES FOR THE 2019 CALENDAR YEAR: ARIZONA FBLA-PBL ARKANSAS FBLA GEORGIA FBLA PENNSYLVANIA FBLA

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: FLORIDA CHAPTER - TONYA ALVAREZ AND ALAN ALVAREZ, FAMILY RELATIONSHIP MAINE CHAPTER - LYDIA ROY, ANGELA ROY, FAMILY RELATIONSHIP

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE MEMBERS OF FBLA-PBL ARE STUDENTS WHO ELECT THE STUDENT REPRESENTATIVES OF THE GOVERNING BODY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE MEMBERS OF FBLA-PBL ARE STUDENTS WHO ELECT THE STUDENT REPRESENTATIVES OF THE GOVERNING BODY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE 990 IS PREPARED BY AN INDEPENDENT ACCOUNTING FIRM AND REVIEWED BY THE ACCOUNTING DEPARTMENT, CEO AND PRESIDENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AND DISCLOSURE FORMS ARE SIGNED ANNUALLY BY THE NATIONAL BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND NATIONAL HEADQUARTERS STAFF.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FORM 990 ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON WRITTEN REQUEST.
INCOME SUMMARY OF CHAPTERS NOT INCLUDED IN CY GROUP RETURN -1,361,997.
